_meta.title: Expectations Investing Framework — Mauboussin & Rappaport
_meta.author: Michael Mauboussin & Alfred Rappaport
_meta.summary: Reads what the current stock price implies about competitive advantage duration (CAP). Alpha = identifying where implied CAP is too optimistic relative to business fundamentals. Price-Implied Expectations (PIE) inversion — not traditional value scoring.
_meta.changelog_v1_1: Fixed reinvestment_rate unit bug (was /100 twice — decimal already). Replaced npm with NOPAT margin (EBIT*(1-eff_tax)/Revenue) for capital-structure-neutral profitability. Replaced 1-year ROCE delta with structural 3-year slope to eliminate single-year noise.

layer_1.name: Implied CAP Approximation
layer_1.description: Vectorized proxy for how many years of above-WACC ROIC the current price encodes. Higher value = more demanding forward expectations locked into price. Uses NOPAT margin (capital-structure-neutral) rather than net profit margin to remove leverage distortion.
layer_1.threshold_rationale: P/E 50x with 30% NOPAT margin and 100% reinvestment gives implied_cap = 15.0. Above this indicates 15+ year perfection expectations — consistent with Mauboussin base-rate evidence that fewer than 25% of companies sustain ROIC > WACC for 10+ years.

layer_2.name: CAP Trap Binary Flag
layer_2.description: 1 = expectations trap: stock priced for 15+ year competitive advantage while economic engine (ROCE 3-year structural slope) is already cooling by more than 1pp/year. Uses structural slope rather than 1-year delta to filter out temporary ROCE dips from one-off items.

layer_3.name: Interactive Reverse DCF Calculator
layer_3.description: On-demand expected value solver using Streamlit number_input widgets. Runs exclusively on the single stock in the user's focus view. Isolated to prevent batch-scan bottlenecks. Formula: EV = (p_upside * upside_pct) - (p_downside * downside_pct).

pillar_t_treadmill.name: Treadmill Safety
pillar_t_treadmill.nan_handling: fillna(0) — assume treadmill not firing if data missing (conservative pass)
pillar_t_treadmill.baseline_text: Expectations Treadmill Safe: stock not priced for indefinite perfection requiring continuous positive surprises

pillar_o_operating_leverage.name: Operating Leverage Integrity
pillar_o_operating_leverage.nan_handling: fillna(1) — assume functioning if unknown (conservative toward pass)
pillar_o_operating_leverage.baseline_text: Operating Leverage Intact: incremental revenue converting efficiently to profit — economic engine healthy

pillar_c_cap_trap.name: CAP Trap Clear
pillar_c_cap_trap.nan_handling: roce_med_3y NaN → fillna(roce) → slope = 0.0 (no decline assumed); pe/nopat_margin/reinvestment_rate fillna(0.0) → implied_cap collapses to 0 (no trap)
pillar_c_cap_trap.baseline_text: Competitive Advantage Period Realistic: no high-CAP expectations paired with structural ROCE decay

mauboussin_nopat_margin.description: EBIT × (1 − effective_tax_rate) / Revenue × 100. Capital-structure-neutral profitability — excludes interest expense. Effective tax rate = (PBT − PAT) / PBT, clipped [0, 0.50], fallback 25%.

mauboussin_implied_cap.description: Implied competitive advantage period proxy: P/E × (nopat_margin/100) × reinvestment_rate

mauboussin_treadmill_breach.description: 1 = safe from expectations treadmill; 0 = treadmill sell alert active

mauboussin_oplev_drift.description: 1 = operating leverage functioning (revenue → profit conversion efficient); 0 = drift

mauboussin_cap_trap.description: 1 = expectations trap detected (implied CAP > 15 and ROCE 3-year slope < -1.0 pp/yr); 0 = clear

mauboussin_pass.description: 1 = passes all 3 Mauboussin gates. Requires: treadmill_breach==1 AND oplev_drift==1 AND cap_trap==0

mauboussin_score.description: treadmill_breach + oplev_drift + (cap_trap==0). Near-miss ranking. Score==3 implies pass==1 (bidirectional — no asymmetric disqualifier unlike Lynch).

nan_handling.pe: fillna(0.0) — implied_cap collapses to 0, no trap generated
nan_handling.mauboussin_nopat_margin: fillna(0.0) before /100 — same collapse logic; NaN when revenue==0
nan_handling.reinvestment_rate: fillna(0.0) — same collapse logic (decimal [0,1], no /100 applied)
nan_handling.sell_alert_treadmill: fillna(0) — assume alert not firing, treadmill_breach defaults to 1 (pass)
nan_handling.operating_leverage: fillna(1) — assume functioning, oplev_drift defaults to 1 (pass)
nan_handling.roce_med_3y: fillna(roce) — no structural decline assumed if 3Y median missing; slope = 0.0

noise_exclusions.rationale: These columns were evaluated during the PIE Inversion Audit and excluded to prevent feature bloat and cross-framework contamination. They are either redundant with existing signals, not available in the CSV schema, or theoretically misaligned with the PIE framework.
noise_exclusions.wacc_gap: Beta (cost of equity via CAPM) not in any CSV sheet. capital_return_spread (roce - 12%) is the best available proxy. True WACC computation permanently deferred.
noise_exclusions.nwc_gap: Net Working Capital change not directly available as a pre-computed column. Would require multi-year balance sheet reconstruction.
noise_exclusions.true_reinvestment_rate_gap: Mauboussin's true RR = (Net Capex + ΔNWC) / NOPAT. Our proxy uses (1 - DPR/100) = earnings retention. Directionally correct but not identical.

vectorization_matrix.approach: Pure Pandas vectorized operations — zero iterrows, zero apply
vectorization_matrix.nopat_margin_computation: np.where(revenue > 0, ebit * (1 - eff_tax) / revenue * 100, NaN) — broadcast-safe
vectorization_matrix.implied_cap_computation: Element-wise multiply of three extracted Series; broadcast-safe across full 2108-row DataFrame
vectorization_matrix.pillar_materialization: np.where conditions on pre-extracted Series with explicit fillna
vectorization_matrix.pass_flag: Boolean AND of three binary column conditions, astype(int)
vectorization_matrix.score_column: Direct integer addition of three binary Series

score_column_logic.bidirectional: Unlike Lynch v1.1 which has an asymmetric inventory surge disqualifier, Mauboussin has no asymmetric veto. Score==3 and pass==1 are perfectly bidirectional.

codex_reference.pie_framework: Price-Implied Expectations — 6 value drivers: Sales Growth, OPM, Cash Tax Rate, WC Investment, Fixed Capital Investment, WACC
codex_reference.treadmill_definition: Stock priced for perfection must continuously exceed already-perfect expectations for price to rise. Single miss triggers severe re-rating.
